title: oxalis griffithii subsp. formosana
intro: Oxalis griffithii subsp. formosana, also known as the Formosa wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oxalis griffithii subsp. formosana include its potential to help manage oxidative stress, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Oxalis griffithii subsp. formosana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, stems, and roots can be utilized in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
